meta.tagline: B2B wholesale plastics — HDPE and PP, sharp pricing.

home.heroLead: Wholesale in plastic sheet, tube and rod. Focus on HDPE and PP. For tank builders, machine shops, food industry and marine.
home.marqueeItems: HDPE · PP · PVC · PMMA · POM · PC · PETG · ABS · PP-H

usps.title: Why M&K
usps.lead: Because quality and price don't have to fight.

home.usp2Desc: For standard sheet sizes — usually faster.
home.usp3Desc: Average price advantage vs. large competitors.
home.usp4Desc: All common engineering plastics in stock.
home.materialsLead: HDPE and PP are our specialty — chemically resistant, food-grade, light and strong. Plus all other common plastics, available fast.
home.stockTitle:
Our core specialty:
HDPE and PP, direct from stock.
home.stockLead: Sharp pricing, standard sheet sizes in stock, fast delivery. We also supply other common plastics — request them via the quote form.
home.stockHdpeTagline: Wear-resistant, moisture-proof, food-grade. Our core stock — always available, direct delivery.
home.stockPpTagline: Chemically resistant up to +100 °C. For tank building with aggressive media, electroplating and lab applications.
home.stockFootnote: Stock levels are updated regularly. For exact availability at the moment, please request a quote.
home.ctaBlockLead: Request a no-strings quote. We reply within one business day with a concrete price.

about.pageLead: A fresh player with experienced people — founded to bring fair pricing back to the market.
about.storyBody: The plastics sheet market has been in flux. Prices went up, quality stayed the same. We rebuilt our supply chain — direct supplier contacts, lean overhead — and pass that pricing advantage to you.

contact.pageLead: Tell us how we can help. We'll call or email back.

footer.tagline: Wholesaler of industrial plastics. Focused on HDPE and PP — same quality, sharper pricing.
